name: All-in-One Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 each Env. Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw frozen peas and carrots.
2. Cook and drain egg noodles.
3. Ensure cheese equals 1/2 cup.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
5. In a large bowl, blend golden onion soup mix with milk; stir in peas, carrots, cooked noodles, and tuna.
6. Turn mixture into a greased 2-quart oblong baking dish.
7. Top with cheese.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until bubbling.
